- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
      Next.js with JavaScript/JSX, App Router, Tailwind CSS, and a minimal Hello World starter.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
      Created the app with create-next-app under a safe temporary folder name because the workspace folder name contains a space, then moved the generated files into the current root.

- [x] Customize the Project
      Replaced the default landing page with a minimal Hello World screen, updated metadata, and converted the project to JavaScript/JSX.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
      No extensions were required by the project setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
      Installed dependencies, removed typed starter-only packages, and verified both npm run build and npm run lint succeed.

- [x] Create and Run Task
      Created a VS Code task for npm run dev and started it successfully.

- [x] Launch the Project
      The development server is running from the task and is currently available on port 3001 because port 3000 was already in use.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
      Updated README.md for the current project and removed the template comments from this file.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
